title: Rumor: iPhone 19e may bring ProMotion display - GSMArena.com news - GSMArena.com
content:
According to a new report from ZDNet Korea, Apple is currently developing a new LTPO+ technology which uses oxide materials for both switching and driving transistors, leading to improved power efficiency and faster response times.

iPhone 17e

The new display tech is expected to make its debut on the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro series, as well as the next-gen iPhone Air and the foldable iPhone. If successfully implemented on these high-end devices, regular LTPO panels will trickle down to the iPhone 19e. [...] Tip us   2.1m   160k   RSS   EV   Merch   Log in

# Rumor: iPhone 19e may bring ProMotion display

 Post your comment
 Comments (9)

Michail  17 March 2026

Apple iOS Mobile hardware Rumors

It’s been less than a week since the iPhone 17e was announced, but we’re already getting our first batch of rumors for its successor’s successor. The iPhone 19e, which should launch in early 2028, is now rumored to bring a ProMotion display. That’s a variable refresh rate panel in Apple lingo, which would be a breakthrough for the budget “e” lineup, which has thus been limited to 60Hz panels.
title_zh: 傳聞：iPhone 19e 可能會搭載 ProMotion 顯示器 - GSMArena.com 新聞 - GSMArena.com
content_zh:
根據 ZDNet Korea 的一份新報告，Apple 目前正在開發一種新的 LTPO+ 技術，該技術使用氧化物材料作為開關和驅動電晶體，從而提高電源效率和更快的響應時間。

iPhone 17e

這項新的顯示技術預計將在即將推出的 iPhone 18 Pro 系列、下一代 iPhone Air 和可摺疊 iPhone 上首次亮相。如果成功應用於這些高階設備，常規的 LTPO 面板將會下放到 iPhone 19e。

距離 iPhone 17e 發布還不到一週，但我們已經收到了其繼任者的繼任者的第一批傳聞。預計將於 2028 年初推出的 iPhone 19e，現在傳聞將會搭載 ProMotion 顯示器。在 Apple 的術語中，這是一種可變刷新率面板，對於預算型的「e」系列來說將是一個突破，因為該系列迄今為止一直僅限於 60Hz 面板。

title: Apple TV Is Now Almost 20 Years Old - MacRumors
content:
In 2010, it dropped the internal hard drive and shifted to a smaller, streaming-focused design. The introduction of tvOS and the ‌App Store‌ in 2015 marked a major turning point, enabling third-party apps and games. Apple later added 4K support in 2017 and continued to iterate with faster chips, culminating in the current model powered by the A15 Bionic chip. [...] Buyer's Guide: Apple TV (Don't Buy)

# Apple to Launch More New Hardware This April

by Tim Hardwick

Apple isn't done yet. After announcing seven new products in March – including the iPhone 17e, iPad Air, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, MacBook Neo, Studio Display, and Studio Display XDR – the company has one more launch on the books in the coming weeks (as far as we know, at least).

AirPods Max 2 go up for pre-order on March 25, with availability beginning in early April. The updated over-ear headphones come in midnight, starlight, orange, purple, and blue - the same colors as the previous generation.

# 蘋果將於今年四月推出更多新硬體

Tim Hardwick 撰寫

蘋果尚未結束。在三月宣布推出七款新產品後——包括 iPhone 17e、iPad Air、MacBook Air、MacBook Pro、MacBook Neo、Studio Display 和 Studio Display XDR——該公司在未來幾週內還有一次發布計畫（至少據我們所知）。

AirPods Max 2 將於 3 月 25 日開放預購，並於四月初開始供貨。這款更新的耳罩式耳機有午夜色、星光色、橘色、紫色和藍色可供選擇——與上一代顏色相同。

title: Apple’s AirPods Max 2 Blurs the Lines Between Marketing and Innovation - Bloomberg.com
content:
The new AirPods Max headphones show that the line between marketing and genuine innovation is blurring. Also: Apple retail stores have hiked the price of external storage; inventory of HomePods and Apple TVs is dwindling again; and the company’s home hardware chief has bolted for Oura.

Last week in Power On: Apple’s Liquid Glass interface isn’t going anywhere anytime soon.

### The Starters

This past week, shortly after refreshing several Macs, the iPhone 17e and the iPad Air, Apple Inc. announced the AirPods Max 2. [...] Apple has had fresh versions of at least the Apple TV and HomePod mini ready since last year, but it’s held off on releasing them because the company is waiting for the new Siri and other artificial intelligence upgrades. Those features are still nowhere near ready, so if the new hardware is indeed coming soon, it probably means Apple just got tired of waiting. (Though the AI features are essential to a separate long-awaited home hub, they’re just a nice add-on for the HomePods and Apple TV.) [...] Q: Where’s the entry-level iPad update?
title_zh: 蘋果的 AirPods Max 2 模糊了行銷與創新之間的界線 - Bloomberg.com
content_zh:
新款 AirPods Max 耳機顯示，行銷與真正創新之間的界線正在模糊。此外：蘋果零售店提高了外接儲存的價格；HomePod 和 Apple TV 的庫存再次減少；該公司的家庭硬體主管已跳槽至 Oura。

上週在 Power On 專欄中提到：蘋果的 Liquid Glass 介面短期內不會有任何進展。

### 開場

過去一週，在更新了多款 Mac、iPhone 17e 和 iPad Air 後不久，蘋果公司宣布推出 AirPods Max 2。[...] 蘋果至少從去年起就準備好了新版 Apple TV 和 HomePod mini，但一直沒有發布，因為該公司正在等待新的 Siri 和其他人工智慧升級。這些功能仍遠未準備就緒，因此如果新硬體確實即將推出，那可能意味著蘋果只是厭倦了等待。（儘管這些 AI 功能對於一個獨立的、期待已久的家庭中樞至關重要，但對於 HomePod 和 Apple TV 來說，它們只是一個不錯的附加功能。）[...] 問：入門級 iPad 的更新在哪裡？

title: New Apple TV and HomePod Mini Remain 'Ready' to Launch - MacRumors
content:
The current Apple TV 4K debuted in October 2022, and the HomePod mini was introduced in October 2020, so both devices are due for upgrades.
